## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test-only change

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passed locally
- [ ] I tested key CLI path(s) affected by this change
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior/flags changed

## Notes for Reviewers

Add any context that helps review quickly (tradeoffs, assumptions, follow-ups).
